retrospective.summary: Added GitHub as a second integration on the integrations page. Updated DEFAULT_PROVIDER_CONFIG_KEYS to use github-app-oauth. Added GitHub panel with connect/disconnect controls mirroring the Slack panel. Both integrations are fetched in parallel on page load.
